theme: Light Theme with Luxury Deep Purple Highlights
reasoning: This is an investor-facing B2B2C product. It requires the high-end, premium feel of hospitality (Luxury) for the Guest/Splash experiences, crossed with the high-contrast, data-dense clarity of a Swiss structure for the Admin/Staff panels. The brand colors are strictly adhered to, using them for structural hierarchy and emotional storytelling rather than just generic 'SaaS' branding.

typography.anti_patterns_avoided: Avoided center-everything alignment. Applied tight letter spacing for large headers and generous tracking for overlines. Prevented generic weight distribution by locking headings to bold/semibold.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6 to p-8 internally on cards) for Guest app to feel luxurious. Tight Control Room Grid for Staff/Admin to maximize scanability.

guest_app.container: w-full h-[844px] max-w-[390px] rounded-[40px] border-[8px] border-black bg-[#F8F6FC] overflow-hidden relative shadow-2xl

staff_app.container: w-full h-[844px] max-w-[390px] rounded-[40px] border-[8px] border-black bg-[#F8F6FC] overflow-hidden relative shadow-2xl

spacing_and_layout.bento_rules: Dashboard uses 'Control Room' dense mode. Main KPI cards are col-span-1. Charts span 2 or 3 columns.

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white rounded-[20px] shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(91,44,145,0.08)] border border-[#A78BD9]/20 p-6
surface_strategies.buttons_primary: bg-[#F47B20] text-white rounded-[12px] px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[#d66718] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#F47B20]/50
surface_strategies.buttons_secondary: bg-[#F8F6FC] text-[#5B2C91] border border-[#5B2C91]/20 rounded-[12px] px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[#5B2C91] hover:text-white transition-all
surface_strategies.ai_badges: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#5B2C91]/10 to-[#F47B20]/10 border border-[#F47B20]/30 text-xs font-semibold text-[#5B2C91]
surface_strategies.headers: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-[#A78BD9]/20

motion_and_interactions.ai_sparkle: Animate ✨ SVG icon with a slow pulse and rotation. Use a moving background gradient (Tracing Beam style) for 'AI-picked' cards.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow depth.

splash_screen.layout: Full screen bg-[#1F1B2E]. Huge centered brand wordmark. 3 large interactive cards (Guest, Staff, Admin) to select demo path. 'Play Investor Demo' floating action button to auto-walk.

guest_app.Home: Welcome text over a subtle #5B2C91 gradient header. 'My Requests' tracker showing SLA countdown. Proactive Nudge popup (glassmorphism overlay).
guest_app.AI_Concierge: Chat interface. Guest messages grey, AI messages #F8F6FC with #5B2C91 text. Pulse animation on mic.
guest_app.Recommendations: Horizontal scroll of cards featuring Spa/Restaurant images. ✨ AI-picked badges on top corner.

staff_app.Dashboard: Top 'Next-Best-Action' hero card (bg-gradient-to-br from-[#5B2C91] to-[#7B3FBF] text-white).
staff_app.Tasks: List with priority scores (Red/Amber/Green). AI-predicted ETA text.
staff_app.Copilot: Checklist UI automatically generating step-by-step SOPs.

admin_dashboard.GM_Digest: Top full-width card. Plain English AI summary. Left aligned text.
admin_dashboard.Charts: Request volume area chart (fill: #A78BD9), Department donut, Complaint horizontal bar.
admin_dashboard.Anomaly: Card with red warning text and an orange 'Recommended Actions' button.

hotel_interiors.description: Luxury bedroom - Use for Room Request visual or Guest App Hero

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICT ADHERENCE TO BRAND COLORS: The palette defined above must be used exactly. Do not invent new gradients or off-brand colors.

LAYOUT EXECUTION: Render the Splash Screen as the root (/). It should contain a showcase layout featuring two iPhone frames (for Guest and Staff apps) and a Macbook/Monitor frame (for Admin Panel). Ensure the frames look realistic.

INTERACTIVITY: Implement the 'Play Investor Demo' functionality. This should trigger a sequential, auto-scrolling tour using Framer Motion to step through the Cross-App Demo Flow: Guest (types request) -> Staff (receives next-best-action) -> Admin (Dashboard anomaly updates).

COMPONENT USAGE: Use Shadcn UI primitives for forms, tables, tabs, and modals. For high-fidelity cards and interactive visuals (especially on the Guest app), build custom HTML/Tailwind components to ensure they feel luxurious and non-templated.
DATA VISUALIZATION: Use Recharts for the Admin dashboard. Customize chart tooltips and gridlines to be minimal and match the #5B2C91 / #A78BD9 colors.
TESTING: Every interactive element MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='guest-chat-input').
PILL SHAPES: Primary CTA buttons must be pill-shaped or heavily rounded (12px minimum radius) as specified by brand guidelines.
